prompt: A soft pastel anime illustration of a cute little girl sitting on the floor in a compact pose with both knees pulled up, one cheek resting on one hand, smiling gently at the viewer. She has light ash beige brown hair styled in a high side ponytail tied with a lavender scrunchie, with wispy bangs and loose curls framing her face. She has very large glossy blue-violet eyes, a tiny nose, rosy cheeks, and a sweet chibi-inspired face. She wears 2 hair clips on the side of her bangs, one yellow wavy clip and one pink double-bar clip. Her outfit is a cozy oversized white sweatshirt with lavender trim at the collar and cuffs and a small purple squiggle motif on one sleeve, loose lavender shorts, white slouch socks, and chunky white sneakers accented with teal, lavender, and pink. She also wears a small round teal crossbody bag with a gold zipper and a cherry charm hanging from it. Use a clean white background with sparse playful doodle elements: 1 pink heart outline, 2 small yellow triangle shapes, 1 teal triangle shape, several tiny pastel confetti dots, and 1 lavender halftone dot patch near the lower right. Render in a delicate airy watercolor-like manga style with thin sketchy linework, soft shading, muted candy colors, lots of negative space, and a gentle innocent mood.
